description: Charlie proactive automation conductor — weekly scheduled tasks

schedule.name: Dead Code Cleanup
schedule.description: Run economizer agent to find dead code, create PR if findings exceed threshold

schedule.name: Coverage Threshold Bump
schedule.description: Run mutation-tester; if mutation score >70%, bump coverage threshold by 2%

schedule.name: Weekly Release Notes
schedule.description: Synthesize week findings and git log into CHANGELOG draft

schedule.name: Weekly Team Update
schedule.description: Summarize week agent performance + key findings into team-update.md
